title: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 40
display_title: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 40
wikitext:
[]: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by UnPatriote » Sat Dec 26, 2020 1:13 pm Evangelion 4.0 is scheduled to debut in Japan on January 23, 2021. But is Evangelion 4.0 coming to theaters in other countries? And do you have any idea when it will be released on bluray? Thanks if you have any information on the subject.

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Dec 26, 2020 1:25 pm There are no news on any showing outside of Japan. The Blu Ray will be released a few months later.

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Dec 26, 2020 10:00 pm Like Joseki said, there's no news. One khara memver hinted they'd like the film to be available abroad, but I wouldn't take that as any confirnation yet. Based on previous khara/bluray-releases it could take anywhere between five and ten-ish months. 3.0 took five so let's hope it's similar this time. :)

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Sun Dec 27, 2020 8:07 am The fourth film's official English title isn't "Evangelion 4.0", but instead the far more convoluted "Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time". If you don't want to write such long titles, just write "Shin Evangelion" (a shortened version of its official Japanese title "Shin Evangelion Gekijōban").

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Jan 01, 2021 9:15 pm 3.0+1.0 is very much unlikely to come to a US theater as just a sub, and even more unlikely to do so right after releasing in Japan. If we get lucky we might get specifically the dub as a 2 or 3 day release in one US cinema chain like how GKids did Promare. EVA's just not popular enough in the US to do what Funi does with Dragon Ball and show literally every movie that releases in theaters the second they finish dubbing it. HOWEVER, considering the impact of [BACKSTREET BOYS REUNION TOUR] on theaters combined with how densely packed Japan's population is, AND the movie being delayed because of it, it's not out of the realm of possibility that the movie will get a digital release on the same day as theatrical, or shortly following it. And if it's not available in your country, and the only version that exists has no English subtitles despite potential VPN usage, there are... other ways to watch it. It's not piracy if there's no way you could have accessed it in the first place IMO. Just make sure to get the US Blu Ray release when Funi releases it 5 years from now.

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by Kiiwiibird » Mon Jan 11, 2021 8:48 pm I figure that the moment any kind of digital copy gets released it'll be immediately put online by someone, such is life in a digital age ig which i mean, i'm not gonna complain considering i live in australia and we already notoriously get extreme delays for even normal american films, even if it somehow got a global theater launch there's no way it'd come to fucking rural ass country bumpkin fucking western australia. if you gotta you gotta imo fingers crossed someone pumps out a translation for it though hah

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Wed Jan 13, 2021 10:21 pm The film will leak to places outside of Japan once a digital release is out obviously I completely condone piracy of any kind. And even if a leaked version has no subtitles someone will most likely as they did with 3.0 put subtitles onto it illegally which is completely wrong and I condone it.

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by Kiiwiibird » Thu Jan 14, 2021 5:09 am I once watched a torrent of eva where as unit 01 was launching the subtitles was just "BALLS BALLS BALLS BALLS BALLS BALLS BALLS" crime is wrong, kids

[]: Re: Two questions about the release of Evangelion 4.0             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Jan 14, 2021 10:04 am Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: The film will leak to places outside of Japan once a digital release is out obviously I completely condone piracy of any kind. And even if a leaked version has no subtitles someone will most likely as they did with 3.0 put subtitles onto it illegally which is completely wrong and I condone it.
